links.title: Sentry — errors
links.tooltip: Crash & error tracking (uncaught, dead-letter jobs, review failures)

options.content:
## 🧠 AI providers
- **Claude Code / Codex** — subscription CLIs, the review brain. Health: app boot log `selfhost_ai_provider`.
- **Ollama** — embeddings (`bge-m3`) for RAG · [API root](http://localhost:11434) · `docker exec loopover-ollama-1 ollama list`

## 🔎 Vector store (RAG)
- **Qdrant** — [Dashboard](http://localhost:6333/dashboard) · [Collections API](http://localhost:6333/collections)
- Embeddings indexed per repo; see the *RAG indexing* doc.

## ⚙️ Engine / API
- **loopover app** — [/ ](http://localhost:8787/) · [/ready](http://localhost:8787/ready) · [/metrics](http://localhost:8787/metrics)
- Internal jobs: `POST /v1/internal/jobs/rag-index` (bearer `INTERNAL_JOB_TOKEN`)

## 💾 Data
- **SQLite** (default) at `/data/loopover.sqlite` — private to the app/exporter. Grafana reads `/reporting/loopover-reporting.sqlite`, a redacted reporting snapshot.
- **Postgres/pgvector** (optional `--profile postgres`).

> Links assume the default published ports on the Docker host. If you run Grafana on a remote host, replace `localhost` with that host, and publish the service `ports:` you want to reach.

## 📊 Dashboards
- **[Upstream PRs & issues (GitHub)](/d/loopover-github)** — live, accurate census + open-PR triage (GitHub API).
- **[Reviews & PRs (maintainer)](/d/loopover-maintainer)** — loopover's own review activity + reviewed-PR log.
- **[AI usage](/d/loopover-ai-usage)** — durable cross-provider ai_usage_events (filterable by provider/feature/model), live Prometheus counters, and Claude Code's own OTEL session telemetry, all in one place.
- **[LoopOver (infra)](/d/loopover-selfhost)** — queue, jobs, HTTP, GitHub API cache/rate limits.
- **[GPU metrics](/d/loopover-gpu)** — utilization/VRAM for a self-hosted Ollama GPU box.
- **[Infra health](/d/loopover-infra-health)** — host CPU/mem/disk/network (node-exporter), per-container resource usage (cAdvisor), Redis, Qdrant, and whether the observability stack itself is up.
- **[REES (review-enrichment)](/d/loopover-rees)** — request outcomes/latency and per-analyzer run/timeout/degrade rates for the optional `--profile rees` service.
- **[Browserless (visual review)](/d/loopover-browserless)** — queue depth, concurrency, and rejection/error/timeout rate for the optional `--profile visual-review` screenshot service.
- **[Sentry issues](/d/loopover-sentry)** — recent unresolved issues, top issues by event count, and error-volume trend, queried live from Sentry (`scripts/setup-sentry-datasource.sh`). The plain link below still opens Sentry itself for actions this read-only view can't do (resolving/assigning issues).

## 📈 Metrics & logs
- **Prometheus** — [targets](http://localhost:9090/targets) · [graph](http://localhost:9090)
- **Alertmanager** — [alerts](http://localhost:9093)
- **Loki** — query in [Explore](/explore) (pick the *Loki* datasource), e.g. `{compose_service="loopover"}`
- **Sentry** — release/source-map enriched errors. Edit the dashboard link if your project URL differs.

## 🩺 Quick health checks
| What | Where |
|---|---|
| App serving | `GET /ready` → 200 |
| AI wired | boot log `selfhost_ai_provider` |
| Embeds wired | boot log `selfhost_embed_provider` |
| Vectors wired | boot log `selfhost_vectorize` |
| Token spend | **[AI usage](/d/loopover-ai-usage)** dashboard |

## 📚 Docs
- [Maintainer self-hosting](https://loopover.ai/docs/maintainer-self-hosting) — setup, configuration, AI, REES, RAG, operations, and troubleshooting.

## 🤖 AMS — Autonomous Miner System
- **[Observing your miner](https://github.com/JSONbored/gittensory/blob/main/packages/loopover-miner/docs/observability.md)** — AMS is a separate, local `loopover-miner` CLI a dual-role operator may run alongside ORB on the same box. This guide is the AMS observability entry point: it covers pointing Grafana at the redacted AMS ledger datasources and loading its Grafana dashboard, separate from the ORB review-service observability above.
